title: To Tom Bracken
content:
آ آ آ آ O had you tracked where Kendall trod
آ آ آ آ I think you would be kneelinï؟½
آ آ آ آ Three times a week and thankinï؟½ God
آ آ آ آ That you are of New Zealanï؟½!
آ آ آ آ For this Iï؟½ll say, to make it short,
آ آ آ آ Anï؟½ keep my tongue from clacken,
آ آ آ آ The people are a kinder sort
آ آ آ آ Youï؟½re singinï؟½ for, Tom Bracken
meaning:
Henry Lawson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "To Tom Bracken"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
